title: BlackRock outlines vision for crypto-TradFi convergence as product pipeline grows
message_html: BlackRock outlines vision for crypto-TradFi convergence as product pipeline grows ...
snippet: The firm seeks to offer tokenized long-term investments like "Treasury funds, iShares ETFs, and even private markets."

title: Crypto clearinghouse Glacis Labs raises $6.8 million seed to expand ZeroDelta platform
message_html: Crypto clearinghouse Glacis Labs raises $6.8 million seed to expand ZeroDelta platform ...
snippet: Glacis aims to expand ZeroDelta, its multichain clearing platform for stablecoins, into tokenized securities and foreign exchange over time.
